label: Pawn group kind
description: Identifies the kind of pawn group a PawnGroupMaker generates (e.g. Combat, Trader, Settlement, Peaceful). The kindDef on each PawnGroupMaker entry must reference one of these.

workerClass.label: Worker class
workerClass.description: C# class deriving from PawnGroupKindWorker. The worker controls how pawn groups of this kind calculate minimum points, validate group makers, and generate pawns. Custom mod worker classes are valid.
